deep_dive.title: A Variational Framework for LLM Generator-Regulator Games
deep_dive.abstract: This paper develops a variational framework for regulated language generation. Starting from autoregressive token sampling, we derive the induced distribution over complete messages and relate it to an entropy-regularized Gibbs law. Regulation is modeled as an optimal discriminator whose convex-dual value is an f-divergence, and the generator-regulator interaction is formulated as a saddle-point problem. The framework applies to moderation, censorship, AI deception detection, compliance auditing, phishing defense, and manipulation control, where regulation concerns a distribution over possible messages rather than a single output. The equilibrium clarifies the tradeoff among utility, entropy, regulatory alignment, and finite-length detectability. Two finite-vocabulary case studies, censorship filtering and phishing defense, illustrate how the theory can be evaluated through utility, entropy, divergence, receiver-side scores, and detection probability.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: variational framework for regulated language generation, applicable to content safety
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 调控语言生成的变分框架，适用于内容安全过滤
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 调控语言生成的变分框架，适用于内容安全过滤
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 调控语言生成的变分框架，适用于内容安全过滤
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Develops a variational framework for LLM generator-regulator games, modeling regulatory constraints as f-divergences and clarifying tradeoffs between utility and safety.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前语言生成系统缺乏对监管目标（如内容安全）的系统建模。该文从自回归采样出发，推导出完整消息的分布，并将监管建模为最优判别器的f-散度，生成-监管互动形成鞍点问题。该框架阐明了效用、熵、监管对齐和可检测性之间的权衡，适用于内容审核、安全过滤等场景。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前语言生成系统缺乏对监管目标（如内容安全）的系统建模。该文从自回归采样出发，推导出完整消息的分布，并将监管建模为最优判别器的f-散度，生成-监管互动形成鞍点问题。该框架阐明了效用、熵、监管对齐和可检测性之间的权衡，适用于内容审核、安全过滤等场景。
